description: GenXflo is a no-code visual Nextflow pipeline builder for bioinformatics. Users design workflows on a drag-and-drop canvas and export clean, production-ready Nextflow DSL2 code. Supports Docker and Singularity containerisation, local, HPC, and cloud deployment on AWS, Azure, and Google Cloud, and includes AI-assisted workflow validation.

link.note: documentation on how to use the tool

name: Genxflo
